raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Remove contaminated clothing immediately.
STEP 2: Wash skin with large amounts of soap and water for at least 15 minutes.
STEP 3: Flush eyes with water if any splash occurred.
DO NOT: Use neutralizing agents or ointments on the skin.
ESCALATE: Seek emergency medical attention immediately; bring the product label/SDS.

immediate_steps: Wash skin with large amounts of soap and water for at least 15 minutes.
Flush eyes with water if any splash occurred.
do_not_do: Use neutralizing agents or ointments on the skin.
escalate_when: Seek emergency medical attention immediately; bring the product label/SDS.
